description: A love-forever classic, this murcia bag is a closet essential. Perfect for colour blocking and mix-and-match ensembles, make this piece your go-to essential to add a fresh twist to off-duty staples. Height: 27 cm Width: 33 cm Depth: 8 cm Soft, supple leather upper Fabric lining Metal eyelets on the sides of the upper for style Brand badge on the front Zippered pocket on the back Two main zippered compartments with a pouch in the first compartment and a zippered pocket in the second Care Do not machine wash Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
